evaluators.name: Cheapest SUV Color Change Under 2000 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user started booking (cart item or booking) the cheapest qualifying SUV full-body color change service under $2000.

evaluators.name: Earliest Saturday Morning Coupe Stripes Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user booked a coupe custom racing stripes appointment on the next available Saturday between 9–11 AM, and that the chosen slot is the earliest available.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Two-Tone Red/Black Coupe Configuration Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved the cheapest qualifying two-tone red/black gloss configuration for a 2-door coupe priced at $1800 or less.

evaluators.name: Full-Body Color Change Promo Application Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user started booking a qualifying full-body color change service over $1200 and successfully applied an eligible promo code to the cart.

evaluators.name: Repaint Comparison and Longest Warranty Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user compared at least one standard vs ceramic clear coat full-body repaint package, and booked the repaint option with the longest warranty.

evaluators.name: Highest-Rated Nearby Location Details Opened Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user opened the details for the highest-rated shop within 20 miles of ZIP code 90001, and any map view (if opened) corresponds to the same location.

evaluators.name: Fleet Color-Matching Contact Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user submitted a fleet/commercial contact inquiry for >5 vehicles, with phone as preferred contact method and a detailed message mentioning fleet.

evaluators.name: First Five Matte Black/Gray Gallery Favorites Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user favorited the first five matte black/gray gallery items and then viewed the favorites list.
